---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "Education, appointments, teaching, and selected policy experience."
---

This page is maintained in Markdown so it can be updated without editing templates. A downloadable PDF CV can be added later by placing the file in `assets/files/` and linking it near the top of this page.

## Education

- **PhD in Health Economics**, Monash University, Australia, 2024  
  Supervisors: Prof. David Johnston, A/Prof. Nicole Black, Dr Rohan Sweeney  
  Thesis: *Essays on the economic determinants of health and healthcare utilisation in Indonesia*
- **MSc in Health Economics**, Erasmus University Rotterdam, the Netherlands, 2018
- **MD**, Universitas Gadjah Mada, Indonesia, 2016

## Work Experience

- **Research Fellow**, Health Economics Group, School of Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Monash University, February 2024-present
- **Research Assistant**, Centre for Health Economics, Monash University, Australia  
  With Prof. David Johnston, March-November 2020  
  With Dr Rohan Sweeney, January 2023
- **Research Assistant**, Department of Health Services Research and Policy, Australian National University  
  With Prof. Emily Lancsar, August 2022-December 2023
- **Research Associate**, Centre for Health Financing Policy and Health Insurance Management, Universitas Gadjah Mada, Indonesia  
  Project-based, July-October 2016; full-time, 2019; project-based, January 2020-present
- **General practitioner intern**, Yogyakarta, Indonesia  
  Sleman Subdistrict Public Health Centre, November 2016-February 2017  
  PDHI General Hospital, March-June 2017 and August-December 2018

## Teaching

- **Teaching Associate**, Centre for Health Economics, Monash University, Australia  
  MED4100 Health Economics, July 2021-December 2023

## Selected Consulting and Policy Experience

- Health financing and health technology assessment projects with Indonesian policy partners, including economic evaluation work for cervical cancer screening and cataract extraction.
- Research and policy work through the Centre for Health Financing Policy and Health Insurance Management, Universitas Gadjah Mada.

## Skills

- Applied econometrics
- Health economic evaluation
- Inequality analysis
- Systematic review
- Health policy analysis
- Large-scale longitudinal and linked data analysis
